positiveObservations: Clean implementation following existing CLI command patterns in issue.ts
Proper TypeScript interfaces for NextTaskItem and NextTasksOutput
Comprehensive unit tests covering status grouping, JSON output, project filtering, and error handling
Good separation of concerns with fetchIssuesByStatus helper function
Color-coded human-readable output using picocolors matches existing CLI style
Proper use of resolveCommandContext with requireCompany option
Commit message clearly documents the feature and lists fulfilled assertions

VAL-CLI-001.evidence: Command 'paperclipai issue --help' shows 'next' subcommand (verified in handoff verification)

VAL-CLI-002.evidence: Command output shows ready (todo), active (in_progress/in_review), and blocked categories (verified in tests and handoff)

VAL-CLI-003.evidence: Output includes identifier, title, status, priority, and assignee for each issue (verified in tests and printTaskItem function)
